seo.noPreview: No title or og:title found - nothing to preview.
seo.noOgImage: No og:image - shared links will have no visual

noTitle.title: The page has no title
noTitle.detail: The <title> is the strongest on-page SEO signal and the text shown in search results. Set one in the page's SEO properties.

titleLength.title: Title is {{length}} characters
titleLength.detail: Aim for {{min}}-{{max}} characters: shorter wastes the space, longer gets truncated in search results.

noDescription.title: No meta description
noDescription.detail: Search engines will pick an arbitrary text snippet. Write a 50-160 character summary that makes people want to click.

descriptionLength.title: Meta description is {{length}} characters
descriptionLength.detail: Aim for {{min}}-{{max}} characters so the full text shows in search results.

noindex.title: Page is excluded from search engines (noindex)
noindex.detail: The robots meta tag contains noindex ({{content}}). If this page should be public, remove it - it will never appear in search results.

nofollow.title: Links are not followed (nofollow)
nofollow.detail: The robots meta tag contains nofollow ({{content}}): search engines ignore every link on this page. Verify it is intentional.

noCanonical.title: No canonical URL
noCanonical.detail: A canonical link prevents duplicate-content issues when the page is reachable through several URLs (vanity URLs, parameters).

incompleteOg.title: Incomplete Open Graph tags
incompleteOg.detail: Without og:title and og:image, links shared on social networks and chat tools render as bare URLs. Fill in the page's social/SEO properties.

invalidStructuredData.title: {{count}} invalid JSON-LD blocks
invalidStructuredData.detail: The structured data does not parse, so search engines ignore it. Validate the JSON-LD markup.

noStructuredData.title: No structured data
noStructuredData.detail: JSON-LD (Article, Organization, BreadcrumbList…) enables rich results in search engines. Worth adding on key pages.

noLang.title: Missing lang attribute on <html>
noLang.detail: Screen readers and search engines cannot tell what language the page is in. The template should set <html lang>.

langMismatch.title: Page declares lang="{{htmlLang}}" but is audited in "{{expected}}"
langMismatch.detail: A wrong lang attribute confuses search engines and screen reader pronunciation. Check the template's language handling.

missingAlt.title: {{count}} images without alt attribute
missingAlt.detail: Alt text is how search engines and screen readers understand images. Fill the alt field on each image in the content editor.

genericAnchors.title: {{count}} generic link texts ("click here", "read more"…)
genericAnchors.detail: Descriptive link text helps SEO and screen reader users. Say where the link goes: "Read the 2026 annual report".

links.externalNote: external links are not verified (browser cross-origin restriction)

brokenLinks.title: {{count}} broken internal links
brokenLinks.detail: These links return an error for visitors. Fix or remove them - the list below shows each one with a highlight button.

editWorkspaceUrls.title: {{count}} links point to the edit workspace
editWorkspaceUrls.detail: URLs containing /cms/render/default/ or /cms/edit/ were pasted from the editing UI. Visitors will get a login page or 404. Replace them with internal page links.

hardcodedUrls.title: {{count}} absolute URLs hardcoded to this host
hardcodedUrls.detail: Links written with the full http(s)://host break when the site moves environment or domain. Use internal page links instead.

mixedContent.title: {{count}} http:// links on an https page
mixedContent.detail: Browsers flag or block mixed content. Switch these URLs to https.

blankNoopener.title: {{count}} target="_blank" links without rel="noopener"
blankNoopener.detail: Pages opened in a new tab get access to this page's window object. Add rel="noopener" in the template or rich-text content.

recs.title: Recommendations
recs.none: Nothing to improve in this category.

a11y.noViolations: No violations detected by automated checks.
a11y.machineNote: Automated checks cover a subset of WCAG criteria. A clean result does not certify full compliance; manual review is still required for the rest.

vitals.labNote: Lab measurement of this preview render. Values are directional and differ from real-user (field) data.

slowLcp.title: Main content renders slowly
slowLcp.detail: Compress or preload the hero image / largest block so visitors see the main content sooner.

highCls.title: Layout shifts while loading
highCls.detail: Reserve space for images, embeds and late-loading blocks so the page does not jump under the reader.

slowTtfb.title: Slow server response (TTFB)
slowTtfb.detail: The HTML itself is slow to arrive: enable page caching or review server load before optimizing anything else.

missingDims.title: {{count}} images without width/height attributes
missingDims.detail: Add width and height so the browser reserves the space up front - this is the most common cause of layout shifts.

oversizedImages.title: {{count}} images heavier than needed
oversizedImages.detail: The source file is more than twice its displayed size. Upload resized variants or let Jahia serve smaller renditions.

heavyPage.title: Heavy page ({{size}})
heavyPage.detail: Compress images and remove unused scripts/styles to reduce total download weight, especially for mobile visitors.

manyRequests.title: {{count}} network requests
manyRequests.detail: Combine or drop resources and lazy-load below-the-fold content: each request adds latency.

largeDom.title: Large DOM ({{count}} nodes)
largeDom.detail: Simplify the markup or split very long pages: a large DOM slows rendering and every interaction.

heavyAssets.title: {{count}} very large files (e.g. {{name}})
heavyAssets.detail: Minify, compress or split these assets, or load them only where actually used.

readability.h1Hint: a page should have exactly one H1
readability.headingSkipsHint: avoid jumping levels (e.g. H2 to H4)
readability.noText: Not enough text on this page to compute readability ({{count}} words found).

veryHardText.title: Text is very difficult to read (score {{score}})
veryHardText.detail: Shorten sentences and prefer everyday words. Aim for a score above 50 for a general audience.

hardText.title: Text is difficult to read (score {{score}})
hardText.detail: Shorten the longest sentences and replace jargon: a score of 50-70 suits most website visitors.

longSentences.title: {{count}} sentences longer than 25 words
longSentences.detail: Split them - one idea per sentence. Long sentences are the main driver of a poor readability score.

longParagraphs.title: Dense paragraphs ({{count}} words on average)
longParagraphs.detail: Break paragraphs up: 40-60 words per paragraph reads comfortably on screen.

h1Count.title: {{count}} H1 headings on the page
h1Count.detail: Use exactly one H1: it anchors the page for readers, screen readers and search engines.

headingSkips.title: {{count}} skipped heading levels
headingSkips.detail: Do not jump levels (e.g. H2 straight to H4): fix the hierarchy so the document outline stays meaningful.

thinContent.title: Little text on the page ({{count}} words)
thinContent.detail: Pages under ~300 words inform and rank poorly. Consider expanding the content or merging it elsewhere.
